title: Flip Bits to Zero Count Error

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.outputFormat: Count of flipped bits to get a string of zeros.

examples.explanation: Flipping the third and fourth bits results in a string of zeros.

hints.text: Check if each character in the string is '1' before incrementing the count.

editorial.title: Flip Bits to Zero Count Error

buggyStarterCode.python:
class Solution:
	df solve(self, s: str) -> int:
		c = 0
		s = list(s)
		for i in range(len(s)):
			if s[i] == '1': c += 1
			else: c += 1
		return c

testCases.input: First line count, second line elements (stdin match)
